# programs.bash

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.bash`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.bash.bashrcExtra` | `strings concatenated with ‚Äú\n‚Äù` | Extra commands that should be placed in ~/.bashrc . Note that these commands will be run even in non-interactive shells. |
| `programs.bash.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNU Bourne-Again SHell. |
| `programs.bash.enableAutojump` | | |
| `programs.bash.enableCompletion` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash completion for all interactive Bash shells. |
| `programs.bash.enableVteIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable integration with terminals using the VTE library. This will let the terminal track the current working directory. |
| `programs.bash.historyControl` | `list of (one of ‚Äúerasedups‚Äù, ‚Äúignoredups‚Äù, ‚Äúignorespace‚Äù, ‚Äúignoreboth‚Äù)` | Controlling how commands are saved on the history list. |
| `programs.bash.historyFile` | `null or string` | Location of the bash history file. |
| `programs.bash.historyFileSize` | `null or signed integer` | Number of history lines to keep on file. |
| `programs.bash.historyIgnore` | `list of string` | List of commands that should not be saved to the history list. |
| `programs.bash.historySize` | `null or signed integer` | Number of history lines to keep in memory. |
| `programs.bash.initExtra` | `strings concatenated with ‚Äú\n‚Äù` | Extra commands that should be run when initializing an interactive shell. |
| `programs.bash.logoutExtra` | `strings concatenated with ‚Äú\n‚Äù` | Extra commands that should be run when logging out of an interactive shell. |
| `programs.bash.package` | `null or package` | The bash package to use. |
| `programs.bash.profileExtra` | `strings concatenated with ‚Äú\n‚Äù` | Extra commands that should be run when initializing a login shell. |
| `programs.bash.sessionVariables` | `lazy attribute set of (string or signed integer or absolute path)` | Environment variables that will be set for the Bash session. |
| `programs.bash.shellAliases` | `attribute set of string` | An attribute set that maps aliases (the top level attribute names in this option) to command strings or directly to build outputs. |
| `programs.bash.shellOptions` | `list of string` | Shell options to set. Prefix an option with ‚Äú - ‚Äù to unset. |
